name: Mono Next Public Company Limited
summary: Mono Next Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the media and content business primarily in Thailand. The company produces and distributes entertainment content, magazines and general books, and motion pictures, as well as provides design and implementation services for online business. It also offers online and home shopping agency and location services; and produces TV and other programming. In addition, it provides enterprise software and digital content, and broadcasting and television services. Mono Next Public Company Limited was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Pak Kret, Thailand.
